PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that the petitioner was in Propria Persona, that she was unable to correct the issues, that she was to obtain counsel and that neither is present today. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
